name: healthguard
description: Open-source, self-hosted application health monitoring for H5 and mini program applications.

scripts.build:packages: yarn workspace @health-guard/core build && yarn workspace @health-guard/sdk-web build && yarn workspace @health-guard/sdk-miniprogram build && yarn workspace @health-guard/sdk-uniapp build && yarn workspace @health-guard/repair-agent build
scripts.build:apps: yarn workspace @healthguard/dashboard build && yarn workspace @healthguard/server build && yarn workspace @healthguard/vue3-demo build
